cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]písmeno N[/hlp] (svislé tahy 100 bodů, diagonála 141 bodů, úhel 135°).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">141</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="180" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block><block type="turtle_left" id="b3" x="20" y="150"><field name="ANGLE">135</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b4" x="180" y="150"><field name="ANGLE">135</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b5" x="100" y="280"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b3"><field name="ANGLE">135</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1"><field name="DISTANCE">141</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">135</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
